statuses.label: Form submission
statuses.hint: Email + WhatsApp customer asking for more information

statuses.label: Attempted to contact
statuses.hint: If no response in 2 working days, call to discuss

statuses.label: Bad timing
statuses.hint: Get back in touch in 1 month, or date suggested

statuses.label: Scheduled
statuses.hint: Add date to calendar

statuses.label: In progress
statuses.hint: Check date with customer

statuses.label: Ready for production
statuses.hint: Email to customer, confirm date of installation

statuses.label: Order doors
statuses.hint: Order in for previous Monday or Tuesday

statuses.label: Order sheets
statuses.hint: Order sheet materials in time for workshop prep

statuses.label: Order hardware
statuses.hint: Includes hinges, handles, and any fixings for the job

statuses.label: Print installer pack
statuses.hint: Renders, cutlist, any installation instructions

statuses.label: Print labels
statuses.hint: Label each component to match the cutlist

statuses.label: Notify customer production is underway
statuses.hint: Send a message letting the customer know work is underway

statuses.label: Prep framework, timber and MDF
statuses.hint: Cut and prep all timber and MDF framework components

statuses.label: Prep sheet materials
statuses.hint: Prepare sheet materials ready for cutting

statuses.label: Cut sheet materials
statuses.hint: Cut all sheet materials to size per the cutlist

statuses.label: In progress
statuses.hint: Wrap and protect all components before loading

statuses.label: Date / time agreed with customer
statuses.hint: Confirm the delivery date and time window with the customer

statuses.label: Ready to load into van
statuses.hint: All components checked, wrapped, and staged for loading

statuses.label: Loaded into van
statuses.hint: All components loaded and secured in the van

statuses.label: Delivered
statuses.hint: Note date, time, and any comments

statuses.label: Scheduled
statuses.hint: Confirm the installation date with both the customer and installer

statuses.label: In progress
statuses.hint: Installation is currently underway on site

statuses.label: Complete
statuses.hint: All components fitted and checked with the customer

statuses.label: Final invoice sent
statuses.hint: Send the final invoice once the installation is signed off

statuses.label: Final payment received
statuses.hint: Mark once payment has cleared

statuses.label: Thank you message sent
statuses.hint: Email customer thanking them and requesting a review
